intent: Decision Agent の構想を技術ブログにしたい
artifact: This post explains the concept of a Decision Agent. First, it defines loop engineering and describes how agents can improve over time. Then it introduces a profile that stores user preferences. Finally, it concludes that better feedback loops are important.

context.audience: AI agent を使っている開発者
context.goal: Loop engineering に Decision Agent が必要だと伝える
